// DD/MM\n    if (second > 12) return new Date(year, first - 1, second); // MM/DD\n    return new Date(year, second - 1, first); // défaut DD/MM (dayFirst)\n  }\n\n  // Cas 5 : DD-MM-YYYY ou MM-DD-YYYY avec tirets\n  if (/^\\d{1,2}-\\d{1,2}-\\d{4}$/.test(s)) {\n    var p = s.split('-');\n    var first = parseInt(p[0]);\n    var second = parseInt(p[1]);\n    var year = parseInt(p[2]);\n    if (first > 12) return new Date(year, second - 1, first);\n    if (second > 12) return new Date(year, first - 1, second);\n    return new Date(year, second - 1, first);\n  }\n\n  // Cas 6 : timestamp numérique en millisecondes\n  if (/^\\d+$/.test(s)) {\n    return new Date(parseInt(s));\n  }\n\n  // Cas 7 : tentative de parse natif en dernier recours\n  var fallback = new Date(val);\n  return isNaN(fallback.getTime()) ? null : fallback;\n}\n\n// --- Validation ---\nvar d = parseAnyDate(input);\n\nif (!d || isNaN(d.getTime())) {\n  valid = true;                             "customAction": "if (window.__visaDocsBound) return;\nwindow.__visaDocsBound = true;\n\nvar form = Object.values(Formio.forms)[0];\nif (!form) return;\n\nfunction loadVisaDocs(){\n\n  var visaCode = form.submission.data.typeVisaResult;\n  if (!visaCode) return;\n\n  var cacheKey = '_visaDocsCache_' + visaCode;\n\n  if (window[cacheKey]) {\n    form.submission.data.DocumentsVisa = window[cacheKey];\n\n    var c = form.getComponent('DocumentsVisa');\n    if (c) c.setValue(window[cacheKey]);\n\n    form.triggerChange();\n    return;\n  }\n\n  fetch('https://api-citizen-voyage.sandbox.gouv.tg/api/v1/dynamics/visa-types')\n  .then(function(res){\n    if(!res.ok) throw new Error(res.status);\n    return res.json();\n  })\n  .then(function(json){\n\n    var members = json && json.data && json.data['hydra:member'];\n    if (!Array.isArray(members)) return;\n\n    var visa = null;\n\n    for (var i = 0; i < members.length; i++) {\n      if (members[i].code === visaCode) {\n        visa = members[i];\n        break;\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (!visa) return;\n\n    var settings = visa.upload_file_settings || [];\n    var docs = [];\n\n    for (var j = 0; j < settings.length; j++) {\n      var s = settings[j];\n\n      if (s.enabled && s.upload_file) {\n        docs.push(s.upload_file); // ✅ on garde tout l'objet\n      }\n    }\n\n    window[cacheKey] = docs;\n\n    form.submission.data.DocumentsVisa = docs;\n\n    var comp = form.getComponent('DocumentsVisa');\n    if (comp) comp.setValue(docs);\n\n    form.triggerChange();\n\n  })\n  .catch(function(err){\n    console.error('Visa documents error:', err);\n  });\n}\n\nform.on('change', function(e){\n  if (e.changed && e.changed.component && e.changed.component.key === 'typeVisaResult') {\n    loadVisaDocs();\n  }\n});\n\nloadVisaDocs();",

i<=31; i++) {\n        var opt = document.createElement('option');\n        opt.value = i;\n        opt.textContent = i;\n        sel.appendChild(opt);\n      }\n    }\n  });\n  \n  // Remplir les selects de mois\n  ['modal-debut-mois','modal-fin-mois'].forEach(function(id) {\n    var sel = document.getElementById(id);\n    if(sel && sel.options.length === 0) {\n      moisNoms.forEach(function(m, idx) {\n        var opt = document.createElement('option');\n        opt.value = idx + 1;\n        opt.textContent = m;\n        sel.appendChild(opt);\n      });\n    }\n  });\n  \n  // Remplir les selects d'années\n  ['modal-debut-annee','modal-fin-annee'].forEach(function(id) {\n    var sel = document.getElementById(id);\n    if(sel && sel.options.length === 0) {\n      for(var i=2024; i<=2030; i++) {\n        var opt = document.createElement('option');\n        opt.value = i;\n        opt.textContent = i;\n        sel.appendChild(opt);\n      }\n    }\n  });\n  \n  // Ouvrir modal\n  if(btnModifier) {\n    btnModifier.onclick = function() {\n      var forms = Object.values(Formio.forms);\n      if(forms[0]) {\n        var d = forms[0].submission.data;\n        \n        // Parser et remplir date début\n        if(d.date_debut_sejour) {\n          var parts = d.date_debut_sejour.split('/');\n          if(parts.length === 3) {\n            document.getElementById('modal-debut-jour').value = parseInt(parts[0]);\n            document.getElementById('modal-debut-mois').value = parseInt(parts[1]);\n            document.getElementById('modal-debut-annee').value = parseInt(parts[2]);\n          }\n        }\n        \n        // Parser et remplir date fin\n        if(d.date_fin_sejour) {\n          var parts2 = d.date_fin_sejour.split('/');\n          if(parts2.length === 3) {\n            document.getElementById('modal-fin-jour').value = parseInt(parts2[0]);\n            document.getElementById('modal-fin-mois').value = parseInt(parts2[1]);\n            document.getElementById('modal-fin-annee').value = parseInt(parts2[2]);\n          }\n        }\n        \n        // Remplir motif et type entrée\n        if(d.motifVoyage) document.getElementById('modal-motif').value = d.motifVoyage;\n        if(d.typeEntree) document.getElementById('modal-type-entree').value = d.typeEntree;\n      }\n      modal.classList.add('active');\n    };\n  }\n  \n  function closeModal() { modal.classList.remove('active'); }\n  \n  if(btnClose) btnClose.onclick = closeModal;\n  if(btnAnnuler) btnAnnuler.onclick = closeModal;\n  if(modal) modal.onclick = function(e) { if(e.target === modal) closeModal(); };\n  \n  // Appliquer\n  if(btnAppliquer) {\n    btnAppliquer.onclick = function() {\n      var forms = Object.values(Formio.forms);\n      if(forms[0]) {\n        var f = forms[0];\n        \n        // Construire les dates\n        var newDateDebut = document.getElementById('modal-debut-jour').value + '/' + document.getElementById('modal-debut-mois').value.toString().padStart(2,'0') + '/' + document.getElementById('modal-debut-annee').value;\n        var newDateFin = document.getElementById('modal-fin-jour').value + '/' + document.getElementById('modal-fin-mois').value.toString().padStart(2,'0') + '/' + document.getElementById('modal-fin-annee').value;\n        var newMotif = document.getElementById('modal-motif').value;\n        var newTypeEntree = document.getElementById('modal-type-entree').value;\n        \n        // Mettre à jour les champs Form.io\n        if(f.getComponent('date_debut_sejour')) f.getComponent('date_debut_sejour').setValue(newDateDebut);\n        if(f.getComponent('date_fin_sejour')) f.getComponent('date_fin_sejour').setValue(newDateFin);\n        if(f.getComponent('motifVoyage')) f.getComponent('motifVoyage').setValue(newMotif);\n        if(f.getComponent('typeEntree')) f.getComponent('typeEntree').setValue(newTypeEntree);\n      }\n      closeModal();\n    };\n  }\n}, 1500);"

                            "customAction": "// ─── Garde : éviter les doublons ───────────────────────────────────\nif (window.__docListRendered) return;\nwindow.__docListRendered = true;\n\nvar form = Object.values(Formio.forms)[0];\nif (!form) return;\n\n// ─── 1. Récupérer typeVisaResult stocké par visaCheckTrigger ───────\nvar visaCode = form.submission.data.typeVisaResult || form.data.typeVisaResult;\n\nconsole.log('[DOC-LIST] typeVisaResult récupéré :', visaCode);\n\nif (!visaCode) {\n  renderError('Aucun type de visa détecté. Veuillez revenir à l\\'étape précédente.');\n  return;\n}\n\n// ─── 2. Afficher le loader ──────────────────────────────────────────\nvar output = document.getElementById('doc-list-output');\nif (!output) return;\n\noutput.innerHTML = `\n  <div style=\"padding:24px;text-align:center\">\n    <div style=\"width:36px;height:36px;border:3px solid #e5e7eb;\n                border-top-color:#006A4F;border-radius:50%;\n                animation:docSpin .8s linear infinite;\n                margin:0 auto 12px\"></div>\n    <p style=\"font-family:Poppins,sans-serif;color:#6b7280;font-size:14px;margin:0\">\n      Chargement des documents requis...\n    </p>\n  </div>`;\n\n// Ajouter l'animation CSS si absente\nif (!document.getElementById('doc-spin-style')) {\n  var style = document.createElement('style');\n  style.id = 'doc-spin-style';\n  style.textContent = '@keyframes docSpin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }';\n  document.head.appendChild(style);\n}\n\n// ─── 3. Appeler l'API visa-types ────────────────────────────────────\nfetch('https://api-citizen-voyage.sandbox.gouv.tg/api/v1/dynamics/visa-types')\n  .then(function(r) { return r.json(); })\n  .then(function(json) {\n\n    // Adapter selon la structure réelle retournée\n    var members = [];\n    if (json.data && json.data['hydra:member'])      members = json.data['hydra:member'];\n    else if (json['hydra:member'])                   members = json['hydra:member'];\n    else if (Array.isArray(json.data))               members = json.data;\n    else if (Array.isArray(json))                    members = json;\n\n    console.log('[DOC-LIST] Visa types reçus :', members.length);\n\n    // ─── 4. Trouver le visa correspondant ────────────────────────────\n    var matched = members.find(function(vt) {\n      return vt.code === visaCode || String(vt.id) === String(visaCode);\n    });\n\n    if (!matched) {\n      renderError('Type de visa introuvable pour le code : ' + visaCode);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    console.log('[DOC-LIST] Visa trouvé :', matched.code);\n\n    // ─── 5. Filtrer les documents (enabled uniquement) ────────────────\n    var allSettings = (matched.upload_file_settings || []).filter(function(s) {\n      return s.enabled === true;\n    });\n\n    var required = allSettings.filter(function(s) { return s.required === true; });\n    var optional = allSettings.filter(function(s) { return s.required === false; });\n\n    // ─── 6. Nom du visa (FR en priorité, sinon EN) ───────────────────\n    var translations = matched.translations || [];\n    var nameFr = (translations.find(function(t) { return t.locale === 'fr'; }) || {}).name;\n    var nameEn = (translations.find(function(t) { return t.locale === 'en'; }) || {}).name;\n    var visaName = nameFr || nameEn || matched.code;\n\n    // ─── 7. Construire le HTML ───────────────────────────────────────\n    var html = `\n      <div style=\"font-family:Poppins,sans-serif;max-width:680px;margin:0 auto\">\n\n        <!-- En-tête -->\n        <div style=\"background:linear-gradient(135deg,#006A4F,#00a878);\n                    border-radius:12px;padding:20px 24px;margin-bottom:24px;color:#fff\">\n          <div style=\"font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;\n                      opacity:.8;margin-bottom:4px\">Visa sélectionné</div>\n          <div style=\"font-size:20px;font-weight:700\">${visaName}</div>\n          <div style=\"font-size:13px;opacity:.75;margin-top:4px\">\n            ${required.length} document(s) obligatoire(s) · \n            ${optional.length} document(s) optionnel(s)\n          </div>\n        </div>`;\n\n    // ── Bloc Obligatoires ──\n    if (required.length > 0) {\n      html += `\n        <div style=\"margin-bottom:24px\">\n          <div style=\"display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px\">\n            <span style=\"background:#dc2626;color:#fff;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;\n                         padding:3px 10px;border-radius:999px;letter-spacing:.05em\">\n              OBLIGATOIRES\n            </span>\n            <span style=\"height:1px;flex:1;background:#e5e7eb\"></span>\n          </div>\n          <div style=\"display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px\">`;\n\n      required.forEach(function(s) {\n        html += buildDocCard(s, true);\n      });\n\n      html += `</div></div>`;\n    }\n\n    // ── Bloc Optionnels ──\n    if (optional.length > 0) {\n      html += `\n        <div style=\"margin-bottom:24px\">\n          <div style=\"display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px\">\n            <span style=\"background:#6b7280;color:#fff;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;\n                         padding:3px 10px;border-radius:999px;letter-spacing:.05em\">\n              OPTIONNELS\n            </span>\n            <span style=\"height:1px;flex:1;background:#e5e7eb\"></span>\n          </div>\n          <div style=\"display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px\">`;\n\n      optional.forEach(function(s) {\n        html += buildDocCard(s, false);\n      });\n\n      html += `</div></div>`;\n    }\n\n    html += `</div>`;\n\n    output.innerHTML = html;\n  })\n  .catch(function(err) {\n    console.error('[DOC-LIST] Erreur fetch:', err);\n    renderError('Erreur réseau. Veuillez vérifier votre connexion et réessayer.');\n  });\n\n\n// ─── Helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nfunction buildDocCard(setting, isRequired) {\n  var uf   = setting.upload_file;\n  var desc = getDescriptionEN(uf.description);\n  var icon = getIcon(uf.code);\n  var borderColor = isRequired ? '#dc2626' : '#d1d5db';\n  var bg          = isRequired ? '#fff'    : '#f9fafb';\n\n  return `\n    <div style=\"display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:14px;\n                padding:14px 16px;\n                background:${bg};\n                border:1px solid #e5e7eb;\n                border-left:4px solid ${borderColor};\n                border-radius:8px\">\n      <span style=\"font-size:22px;line-height:1\">${icon}</span>\n      <div style=\"flex:1\">\n        <div style=\"display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap\">\n          <span style=\"font-weight:600;color:#111827;font-size:14px\">${uf.name}</span>\n          ${!isRequired\n            ? '<span style=\"font-size:11px;color:#9ca3af;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;padding:1px 7px;border-radius:999px\">optionnel</span>'\n            : ''}\n        </div>\n        ${desc\n          ? `<p style=\"color:#6b7280;font-size:12px;margin:4px 0 0;line-height:1.5\">${desc}</p>`\n          : ''}\n      </div>\n    </div>`;\n}\n\nfunction getDescriptionEN(raw) {\n  if (!raw) return '';\n  // Chercher la ligne qui commence par (EN)\n  var lines = raw.split(/\\r?\\n/);\n  var enLine = lines.find(function(l) { return l.trim().startsWith('(EN)'); });\n  if (enLine) return enLine.replace(/^\\(EN\\)\\s*/, '').trim();\n  // Fallback : retourner la 1re ligne non vide\n  var first = lines.find(function(l) { return l.trim().length > 0; });\n  return first ? first.replace(/^\\(FR\\)\\s*/,'').trim() : '';\n}\n\nfunction getIcon(code) {\n  var map = {\n    passport_file:               '🛂',\n    photo:                       '📷',\n    reservation_certificate_file:'✈️',\n    travel_assurance_file:       '🛡️',\n    hosting_certificate_file:    '🏨',\n    account_statement_file:      '🏦',\n    invitation_letter_file:      '✉️',\n    registration_certificate_file:'🎓',\n    idResidentPermit:            '🪪',\n    parentage_proof_file:        '👨‍👩‍👧',\n    profession_proof_file:       '💼',\n    idscan:                      '🪪',\n    authorization_file:          '📜',\n  };\n  return map[code] || '📄';\n}\n\nfunction renderError(msg) {\n  var output = document.getElementById('doc-list-output');\n  if (!output) return;\n  output.innerHTML = `\n    <div style=\"padding:16px;border-radius:8px;background:#fee2e2;\n                border:1px solid #ef4444;font-family:Poppins,sans-serif\">\n      <p style=\"color:#991b1b;margin:0;font-size:14px\">❌ ${msg}</p>\n    </div>`;\n}"
                          }

// DD/MM\n    if (second > 12) return new Date(year, first - 1, second); // MM/DD\n    return new Date(year, second - 1, first); // défaut DD/MM (dayFirst)\n  }\n\n  // Cas 5 : DD-MM-YYYY ou MM-DD-YYYY avec tirets\n  if (/^\\d{1,2}-\\d{1,2}-\\d{4}$/.test(s)) {\n    var p = s.split('-');\n    var first = parseInt(p[0]);\n    var second = parseInt(p[1]);\n    var year = parseInt(p[2]);\n    if (first > 12) return new Date(year, second - 1, first);\n    if (second > 12) return new Date(year, first - 1, second);\n    return new Date(year, second - 1, first);\n  }\n\n  // Cas 6 : timestamp numérique en millisecondes\n  if (/^\\d+$/.test(s)) {\n    return new Date(parseInt(s));\n  }\n\n  // Cas 7 : tentative de parse natif en dernier recours\n  var fallback = new Date(val);\n  return isNaN(fallback.getTime()) ? null : fallback;\n}\n\n// --- Validation ---\nvar d = parseAnyDate(input);\n\nif (!d || isNaN(d.getTime())) {\n  valid = true; // Champ incomplet, \"required\" gère le cas vide\n} else {\n  valid = d >= today\n    ? true\n    : 'La date de début doit être supérieure ou égale à la date du jour';\n}",

                          "customAction": "setTimeout(function() {\n  var btnModifier = document.getElementById('btn-modifier-visa');\n  var modal = document.getElementById('modal-visa');\n  var btnClose = document.getElementById('modal-close');\n  var btnAnnuler = document.getElementById('btn-annuler');\n  var btnAppliquer = document.getElementById('btn-appliquer');\n  \n  var moisNoms = ['Janvier','Février','Mars','Avril','Mai','Juin','Juillet','Août','Septembre','Octobre','Novembre','Décembre'];\n  \n  // Remplir les selects de jours\n  ['modal-debut-jour','modal-fin-jour'].forEach(function(id) {\n    var sel = document.getElementById(id);\n    if(sel && sel.options.length === 0) {\n      for(var i=1; i<=31; i++) {\n        var opt = document.createElement('option');\n        opt.value = i;\n        opt.textContent = i;\n        sel.appendChild(opt);\n      }\n    }\n  });\n  \n  // Remplir les selects de mois\n  ['modal-debut-mois','modal-fin-mois'].forEach(function(id) {\n    var sel = document.getElementById(id);\n    if(sel && sel.options.length === 0) {\n      moisNoms.forEach(function(m, idx) {\n        var opt = document.createElement('option');\n        opt.value = idx + 1;\n        opt.textContent = m;\n        sel.appendChild(opt);\n      });\n    }\n  });\n  \n  // Remplir les selects d'années\n  ['modal-debut-annee','modal-fin-annee'].forEach(function(id) {\n    var sel = document.getElementById(id);\n    if(sel && sel.options.length === 0) {\n      for(var i=2024; i<=2030; i++) {\n        var opt = document.createElement('option');\n        opt.value = i;\n        opt.textContent = i;\n        sel.appendChild(opt);\n      }\n    }\n  });\n  \n  // Ouvrir modal\n  if(btnModifier) {\n    btnModifier.onclick = function() {\n      var forms = Object.values(Formio.forms);\n      if(forms[0]) {\n        var d = forms[0].submission.data;\n        \n        // Parser et remplir date début\n        if(d.date_debut_sejour) {\n          var parts = d.date_debut_sejour.split('/');\n          if(parts.length === 3) {\n            document.getElementById('modal-debut-jour').value = parseInt(parts[0]);\n            document.getElementById('modal-debut-mois').value = parseInt(parts[1]);\n            document.getElementById('modal-debut-annee').value = parseInt(parts[2]);\n          }\n        }\n        \n        // Parser et remplir date fin\n        if(d.date_fin_sejour) {\n          var parts2 = d.date_fin_sejour.split('/');\n          if(parts2.length === 3) {\n            document.getElementById('modal-fin-jour').value = parseInt(parts2[0]);\n            document.getElementById('modal-fin-mois').value = parseInt(parts2[1]);\n            document.getElementById('modal-fin-annee').value = parseInt(parts2[2]);\n          }\n        }\n        \n        // Remplir motif et type entrée\n        if(d.motifVoyage) document.getElementById('modal-motif').value = d.motifVoyage;\n        if(d.typeEntree) document.getElementById('modal-type-entree').value = d.typeEntree;\n      }\n      modal.classList.add('active');\n    };\n  }\n  \n  function closeModal() { modal.classList.remove('active'); }\n  \n  if(btnClose) btnClose.onclick = closeModal;\n  if(btnAnnuler) btnAnnuler.onclick = closeModal;\n  if(modal) modal.onclick = function(e) { if(e.target === modal) closeModal(); };\n  \n  // Appliquer\n  if(btnAppliquer) {\n    btnAppliquer.onclick = function() {\n      var forms = Object.values(Formio.forms);\n      if(forms[0]) {\n        var f = forms[0];\n        \n        // Construire les dates\n        var newDateDebut = document.getElementById('modal-debut-jour').value + '/' + document.getElementById('modal-debut-mois').value.toString().padStart(2,'0') + '/' + document.getElementById('modal-debut-annee').value;\n        var newDateFin = document.getElementById('modal-fin-jour').value + '/' + document.getElementById('modal-fin-mois').value.toString().padStart(2,'0') + '/' + document.getElementById('modal-fin-annee').value;\n        var newMotif = document.getElementById('modal-motif').value;\n        var newTypeEntree = document.getElementById('modal-type-entree').value;\n        \n        // Mettre à jour les champs Form.io\n        if(f.getComponent('date_debut_sejour')) f.getComponent('date_debut_sejour').setValue(newDateDebut);\n        if(f.getComponent('date_fin_sejour')) f.getComponent('date_fin_sejour').setValue(newDateFin);\n        if(f.getComponent('motifVoyage')) f.getComponent('motifVoyage').setValue(newMotif);\n        if(f.getComponent('typeEntree')) f.getComponent('typeEntree').setValue(newTypeEntree);\n      }\n      closeModal();\n    };\n  }\n}, 1500);"

</span>\n            <span style=\"height:1px;flex:1;background:#e5e7eb\"></span>\n          </div>\n          <div style=\"display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px\">`;\n\n '#dc2626' : '#d1d5db';\n  var bg          = isRequired ?
